allow: PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 20 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match "KieshStock" -or $_.ProviderName -match "KieshStock" -or \($_.LevelDisplayName -eq "Error" -and $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-5\)\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, ProviderName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)

PowerShell($exe = "C:\\Users\\kjden\\source\\repos\\Kieshdh\\KieshStockExchange\\KieshStockExchange\\bin\\Debug\\net9.0-windows10.0.19041.0\\win10-x64\\KieshStockExchange.exe"; if \(Test-Path $exe\) { $p = Start-Process $exe -PassThru -Wait -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\kse_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Exit code: $\($p.ExitCode\)" } else { Write-Host "EXE not found at $exe" })

PowerShell($exe = "C:\\Users\\kjden\\source\\repos\\Kieshdh\\KieshStockExchange\\KieshStockExchange\\bin\\Debug\\net9.0-windows10.0.19041.0\\win10-x64\\KieshStockExchange.exe"; if \(Test-Path $exe\) { Write-Host "EXE exists, size: $\(\(Get-Item $exe\).Length\)" } else { Write-Host "EXE NOT found" })

PowerShell($pinfo = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo; $pinfo.FileName = "C:\\Users\\kjden\\source\\repos\\Kieshdh\\KieshStockExchange\\KieshStockExchange\\bin\\Debug\\net9.0-windows10.0.19041.0\\win10-x64\\KieshStockExchange.exe"; $pinfo.UseShellExecute = $false; $pinfo.RedirectStandardOutput = $true; $pinfo.RedirectStandardError = $true; $p = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start\($pinfo\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(!$p.HasExited\) { Write-Host "App is running with PID $\($p.Id\)"; $p.Kill\(\) } else { Write-Host "App exited with code $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Write-Host "STDOUT:"; Write-Host $p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "STDERR:"; Write-Host $p.StandardError.ReadToEnd\(\) })
